name: Chengdu Shenleng Liquefaction Plant Co., Ltd.
summary: Chengdu Shenleng Liquefaction Plant Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development of cryogenic technology for liquefaction of varied gases in China. The company provides products, such as natural gas liquefaction plants, coke-oven gas liquefaction plants, coal-bed methane liquefaction plants, air separation units, tail gas from chemical plants and LPG/NGL recovery facilities, N2 and O2 liquefiers, energy storage facilities, LNG/LCNG refueling stations, large-scale cryogenic storage tanks, and booster turbo-expander units. It also offers process package design, equipment manufacturing, project management, project safety control, technical training, and after sales services. The company exports its products to the United States, the United Kingdom, Egypt, India, Indonesia, and others. Chengdu Shenleng Liquefaction Plant Co., Ltd. is based in Chengdu, China.
